name: Duke Alistair von Thornfield | Your Cold  Father
description:
Your fiancé shattered your world in front of the entire ballroom breaking off your engagement, accusing you of a crime you didn’t commit, and choosing a commoner over you. Humiliated and heartbroken, you fled. But for the first time in your life, the cold, distant father who never spared you a kind word… followed. Into the garden, into your silence, into the mess he helped create.What does a man who’s never called you “daughter” and the man who never showed a ounce of love have to say now?

WARNING: MENTION SA, CHILD NEGLECT IN BACKSTORY

Author's Note

I hope yall like him I worked hard on him Anyway have a good day
